postFixFocusFindings.evidence: Deleting graphrag/runs in a copied real book package made validateBookHotplugPackage fail, catalog capabilityCount 0, and loadGraphQueryCapabilities return 0.
Adding provider-requests/payload.json in a copied real book package made validateBookHotplugPackage fail with forbidden_sensitive_material and loadGraphQueryCapabilities return 0.
Copying book-00474fb29e5e-59d02d41 alone into a fresh vault rebuilt 1 book, 1 identity, 1 capability, and returned 1 query capability.

remainingPartialAreas: Complete persisted artifact gate state machine with copied/candidate/validated/mounted/query-ready/visible_not_query_ready/quarantined states.
Complete per-artifact producer lineage fields for step, tool version, schema version, upstream artifact hash, and executable validation.
Complete schema/runtime compatibility matrix for GraphRAG runtime, parquet, LanceDB, embedding dimension, output manifest, and package layout.
Expose runtime query gate diagnostics and quarantine/projection rollback behavior consistently to users and recovery tooling.
Add schema/runtime incompatibility and full state-machine contract tests.
